nasb.text: And I heard the angel of the waters saying, “Righteous are You, who are and who were, O Holy One, because You judged these things;

esv.text: And I heard the angel in charge of the waters say, “Just are you, O Holy One, who is and who was, for you brought these judgments.

cnv.text: 我聽見掌管眾水的天使說： “今在昔在的聖者啊！ 你這樣審判是公義的，

ccb.text: 我听见掌管各水源的天使说： “昔在今在的圣者啊！ 你是公义的， 因为你施行了审判。

csbs.text: 接着，我听见那位统管众水的天使说： “今在、昔在的圣者啊，你是公义的， 因为你判定了这些事，
